title: Silo aperture residual: rooms 28/44 + screen-edge sliver dropped via multi-hop grazing portals

history.note: T13b landed the draw-only room-admission mechanism this can reuse: camera-seed portal walk adds grazing-portal rooms to the draw list without sim coupling (g_BgRoomDrawOnly/g_BgRoomDrawOnlyCount, bg.c:2737-2741,16930; default-on via GE007_NO_CAMERA_SEED_WALK opt-out, commits f6ad61a/7a918a7/f312ef7). T13b closed the Silo/Dam BLUE-SKY part, but the aperture residual — rooms 28/44 screen-edge sliver dropped via multi-hop grazing portals — REMAINS. Stays root-caused (not fixed); fix path = extend the T13b draw-only walk to the multi-hop grazing case.

Root cause was NOT a hop/threshold limit: during the Silo intro SWIRL the detached camera orbits INSIDE Bond's own room (room_pointer resolves to g_BgCurrentRoom==26), so the T13b camera-seed walk's camera_seed_room stayed -1 and the draw-only walk was DORMANT for the whole swirl -- the grazing far-wall room (27 at frame 730; the sightline sliver) dropped to the sky-blue clear color (0,24,93). Fix (bg.c): seed the DRAW-ONLY walk from the camera's resolved room for EVERY detached authored-camera frame via a new camera_walk_seed_room (set even when ==g_BgCurrentRoom), leaving the sim-visible D42 seed untouched. The existing single additive visibility pass then admits the grazing room DRAW-ONLY (never room_rendered). Verified: leak closes (Silo swirl blue-sky px 35261->0 at f730, 1177->0 at f690, 995->0 at f705; residual small counts are genuine silo-top sky, confirmed by GE007_FORCE_ALL_ROOMS leaving the same px). Sim purity: room_rendered read-back + RNG call-count + onscreen actors byte-identical fix vs opt-out across 729 intro frames (0 diffs); baseline(main)-default sim-state-hash == fix-default on Silo (16cd4d1f20824692) and Dam (7973f959e096b53a). Over-admit: +1 draw room in swirl (extra mean 0.09), intro-mode unchanged. Opt-out GE007_NO_CAMERA_SEED_MULTIHOP=1 = today's dormant-during-swirl behavior (leak returns; fail-on-revert proven against baseline binary, ctest exit=1). Optional deeper reach GE007_CAMERA_SEED_WALK_HOPS=N (default 0). Lane: port_silo_intro_aperture_regression.
